name: Adaptive Tone
description: Adjusts the assistant's tone by context — time of day, channel, repeated questions, and user-stated wellbeing. Steers delivery only, not facts or safety.

enabled.label: Adaptive Tone
enabled.help: Master switch. When off, the plugin injects nothing and the assistant behaves normally.

time.enabled.label: Time-of-day tone
time.enabled.help: Soften and shorten replies late at night.

time.timezone.label: Timezone (IANA)
time.timezone.help: e.g. Europe/Berlin. Used to decide the hour of day. Defaults to the Gateway host's local time.

place.enabled.label: Channel-aware tone
place.enabled.help: Use a more professional or more casual register depending on the channel.

place.professionalChannels.label: Professional channels
place.professionalChannels.help: Channel ids/prefixes that should get a crisp, formal tone (e.g. slack, teams).

place.casualChannels.label: Casual channels
place.casualChannels.help: Channel ids/prefixes that should get a relaxed, friendly tone (e.g. whatsapp, telegram).

repetition.enabled.label: Patience on repeats
repetition.enabled.help: Be more patient and re-explain differently when the user asks the same thing again.

repetition.windowTurns.label: Repeat scan window
repetition.windowTurns.help: How many recent user turns to scan for repeated asks. Default 6.

repetition.similarityThreshold.label: Repeat similarity threshold
repetition.similarityThreshold.help: Token-overlap (0–1) above which two asks count as the same question. Default 0.8.

wellbeing.enabled.label: Gentler when unwell
wellbeing.enabled.help: Soften tone when the user explicitly says they are unwell or having a hard time. Tone only — never medical advice.

wellbeing.phrases.label: Wellbeing phrases
wellbeing.phrases.help: Lower-cased phrases that trigger the gentler tone. Only explicit, user-volunteered statements are matched.

weather.enabled.label: Weather-aware tone
weather.enabled.help: Adapt tone according to local weather conditions (rainy, sunny, hot, cold).

weather.latitude.label: Latitude
weather.latitude.help: Latitude for weather reports. Defaults to Berlin (52.52).

weather.longitude.label: Longitude
weather.longitude.help: Longitude for weather reports. Defaults to Berlin (13.41).

guidanceOverrides.label: Custom tone text
guidanceOverrides.help: Advanced: replace the default guidance for any tone state. Keep it static (no per-turn data) to preserve prompt caching.
